topic: all world leaders are in cahoots to keep us under control

angles.argument: World leaders regularly attend secretive closed-door meetings like the Bilderberg Group, excluding public scrutiny to coordinate agendas
Global initiatives like the World Economic Forum's Great Reset propose unified policies on economy and society that all major leaders endorse
Leaders from rival nations like US and China collaborate on international bodies such as the UN Security Council, voting in lockstep on key global control measures
search_queries: US China UN Security Council cooperation

angles.argument: Pandemic responses worldwide followed identical protocols—lockdowns, mandates, vaccines—rolled out simultaneously by governments despite no prior coordination claims
Central banks like the Federal Reserve and ECB pursue synchronized monetary policies, inflating currencies in tandem to erode individual wealth
search_queries: global central bank interest rate cuts

angles.argument: Whataboutism: While leaders feud publicly over trade or borders, they unite on surveillance tech like digital IDs and CBDCs to track populations
Climate accords like Paris Agreement bind all major leaders to the same restrictive emission targets and green policies, overriding national sovereignty

search_queries: all world leaders are in cahoots to keep us under control
